name: Romeo Vineyards & Cellars
tagline: Sempre Vive — elegant, enduring Napa Valley wines
seoDescription: Romeo Vineyards & Cellars is a family-owned Calistoga winery crafting Cabernet Sauvignon and Bordeaux varietals from old-vine estate fruit, with tastings in a restored 1885 carriage house and garden in downtown Calistoga.

sections.heading: Old-Vine Napa Valley Wines
sections.subheading: Family-owned in Calistoga since 1996, crafting Cabernet and Bordeaux varietals under the Sempre Vive label.

items.title: Cabernet Sauvignon
items.description: The estate's flagship, built on old-vine fruit and crafted in an elegant, age-worthy Napa Valley style.

items.title: Bordeaux Reds
items.description: Cabernet Franc, Petite Verdot, Merlot and Malbec, made as varietal bottlings and blends under the Sempre Vive label.

items.title: Estate Whites
items.description: A small production of Sauvignon Blanc, Chardonnay and Muscat to round out the portfolio.

items.title: Garden Tastings
items.description: Seated tastings on the patio of the restored 1885 carriage house, among century-old redwoods and cedars; indoor tastings by request.

sections.heading: About Romeo Vineyards & Cellars
body: Frank and Eugenia 'Gena' Romeo purchased their Calistoga vineyard in 1996, drawn to a remarkable block of old-vine Cabernet first planted in 1971. They nursed the estate back to health with Bordeaux-clone replanting and released their inaugural Cabernet Sauvignon soon after — the start of a family commitment to elegant, age-worthy Napa Valley wines bottled under the Sempre Vive ('always alive') label.

In downtown Calistoga, the family restored an 1885 carriage house and opened it as a tasting room, set within gardens shaded by century-old redwoods and cedars. Guests are welcomed through jasmine- and rose-covered arches to taste on the garden patio, with indoor tastings available by request.
highlights: Tastings in a restored 1885 carriage house and garden

items.quote: Clint and Emma were very accommodating, and by far the best tasting room you will find in all of Napa Valley.

items.title: Estate Fruit Including 1971-Planted Old-Vine
items.body: Wines built on a remarkable block of old-vine Cabernet first planted in 1971.

items.title: Family-Owned And Farmed Since 1996
items.body: Rooted right here in Calistoga, with a real family stake in every vintage.

items.title: Tastings In A Restored 1885 Carriage House
items.body: Taste on the garden patio among century-old redwoods, or indoors by request.

items.a: Call us at (707) 942-8239 — we're glad to help.
